reason: Root node 1 cannot be accepted: it does NOT follow from validated children. Its setup node 1.1 (the foundation on which 1.2,1.3,1.3.1,1.4,1.5 all rest) is PENDING with an OPEN CRITICAL challenge (ch-990581934da), and children 1.3.1 and 1.5 carry OPEN MAJOR challenges (ch-afa651c8676, ch-20874bf92f5); 1.3 is pending. Only 1.2 and 1.4 are validated. Blocking defect = Law-L1 byte-verbatim provenance failure: external GT-bhsa-jc asserts VERBATIM 'If A is a C* algebra then A_sa with the Jordan product a o b=(1/2)(ab+ba) is a JB algebra' attributed to refs/hos/joa-m.md:2300 (3.1.2), but that string does NOT string-match the local source. Independently re-grepped (grep -F): line 2300/3.1.2 defines a JC algebra as a norm-closed Jordan subalgebra of B(H)_sa (no conditional 'is a JB algebra', no product formula); the product a o b=(1/2)(ab+ba) lives at lines 812/1575; 'each JC algebra is a JB algebra' at line 2320 -- three distinct loci conflated into one fabricated quote. The MATH is correct (B(H)_sa IS a unital JB algebra; q in Ker P via P^2=P; omega=rho o Phi a state; seminorm via 3.6.2; NO ||Phi||=1; exponents 4.1/HZ=sqrt(eta), HH=eta; constants universal/dimension-free) and ALL other externals re-grepped clean (GT-bh-cstar 458/460, GT-cauchy-schwarz 2631-2636, GT-jb-axiom-sq 2314-2316, GT-jb-orderunit-3310 2552, GT-jb-submult 2306-2312, GT-state-bounded 378, GT-sup-states 394-398, GT-positive-unital Idel 2.1, GT-Pprops/GT-square-hole = validated registry roots). FIX: re-source GT-bhsa-jc to its true loci (2300 for B(H)_sa special-Jordan/JC def; 812 or 1575 for the product; 2320 for JC=>JB), composing them honestly, then re-validate 1.1/1.3.1/1.5; the root cannot be accepted until those children are validated clean.
